follow_ups.title: Download and evaluate Qwen3-ASR 0.6B MLX 8-bit
follow_ups.reason: MLX-Audio exposes a Mac-native Qwen3-ASR streaming API, but the MLX weights are not yet locally evaluated against the 10-case set.

follow_ups.title: Build a local ASR service simulation before Swift app integration
follow_ups.reason: The app needs realtime partial and final events from timed PCM chunks, not only file-level transcription.
